title: sida centuriata
intro: Sida centuriata, also known as the hairy sida or hairy mallow, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida centuriata include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and improve immune function. Sida centuriata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin regeneration.
